task_completion.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax application window is open and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Add the required header and footer text
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text elements reading 'HealthConnect Patient Portal' (header) and '© 2024 HealthConnect Medical Group' (footer) are visible on the canvas.

task_completion.description: Add labeled input fields for Username/Email and Password
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two input field elements are present on the canvas, one labeled 'Username' (or 'Email') and the other labeled 'Password'.

task_completion.description: Add the Sign In button, Remember Me checkbox, and Forgot Password link
task_completion.visual_evidence: A button labeled 'Sign In', a checkbox labeled 'Remember Me', and a text link reading 'Forgot Password?' are visible on the canvas.

task_completion.description: Arrange elements in a vertical login form layout
task_completion.visual_evidence: The header, input fields, interactive elements, and footer are arranged cleanly in a top-to-bottom vertical sequence resembling a standard login page.

task_completion.description: Save the diagram as an EDDX file in the specified directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or the application title bar shows the file being saved as 'patient_portal_wireframe.eddx' in the '/home/ga/Diagrams' directory.

task_completion.description: Export the diagram as a PNG image in the specified directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' dialog or a file manager window shows the file 'patient_portal_wireframe.png' being created or existing in the '/home/ga/Diagrams' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax GUI to create the wireframe
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent actively using the EdrawMax interface (dragging shapes, typing text) rather than using terminal commands or scripts to generate the files.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's built-in save and export features
integrity.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax 'Save' and 'Export' dialogs are visible in the screenshots, confirming the files were generated by the application.

integrity.description: The agent did not spoof the EDDX file using a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is not seen writing XML or JSON code in a text editor and saving it with an .eddx extension.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output files are 'patient_portal_wireframe.eddx' and 'patient_portal_wireframe.png', both located in '/home/ga/Diagrams'. The diagram must contain the text 'HealthConnect', 'Sign In', 'Password', and 'Username' (or 'Email'). The .eddx file must be a genuine EdrawMax file.
